description: Style Note The classic slim Fit trouser is a sartorial mainstay in a woman's wardrobe. Blended fabric composition gives this arrow trouser its smooth feel. Pair this with a crisp formal shirt and get ready to take on the corporate world. Product Details Charcoal slim fit trouser, two slant pockets at front, welt pockets at back, zippered fly with snap, stretchable Material and Care 64% polyester 34% viscose 2%lycra Machine wash in cold water Do not bleach Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8'' ' waist 28'') is wearing a size 28 Style NoteThe classic slim fit trouser is a sartorial mainstay in a woman's wardrobe.
